title: pyrus trilobata
intro: Pyrus trilobata, also known as the three-lobed pear or trilobate pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. Native to the Himalayan region, it has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant's health benefits include treating fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as acting as a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of Pyrus trilobata may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
